$comment: ADOS Reference Model Bank — Domain records (ADOS-EVAL-DOMAIN / ADOS-EVAL-DOMAIN-PAIR). A Domain answers 'what body of knowledge governs correctness and evidence' (ADOS-EVAL-DOMAIN). Each item gets exactly one primary_domain_pair {domain, subdomain?}; secondary pairs are added only for distinct material correctness pressure (ADOS-EVAL-SECONDARY-DOMAIN-PAIR). The materiality test (ADOS-EVAL-DOMAIN drift guard): if changing the label changes no correctness, evidence, risk, vocabulary, or reference class, it is NOT a material Domain. CRITICAL drift guard (ADOS-EVAL-PRIMARY-DOMAIN-PAIR): do NOT choose 'Software engineering' as Primary merely because software implements a domain product — e.g. an SAT app is Primary Domain 'Education/SAT preparation', with 'Software engineering' only Secondary.
materiality_test: If the label changes no correctness, evidence, risk, vocabulary, or reference class, it is not a material Domain (ADOS-EVAL-DOMAIN).
drift_guards: Domain is not Archetype, delivery format, tool, or repository.
Do not choose 'Software engineering' as Primary just because software implements the product.
A Secondary Domain always appears as its own complete Pair.
Do not turn Domain classification into an unbounded keyword list.

domains.label: Information security
domains.governs: Threats, vulnerabilities, data protection, secure handling.

domains.label: Education
domains.governs: Curriculum correctness, scoring validity, pedagogy, learner progress.

domains.label: Natural science
domains.governs: Scientific correctness, units, derivations, empirical evidence.

domains.label: Health / medical
domains.governs: Clinical accuracy, safety, privacy of health data.

domains.label: Finance
domains.governs: Numerical accuracy, regulatory context, risk disclosure.

domains.label: Automotive
domains.governs: Vehicle systems correctness, safety, model-specific behavior.

domains.label: AI / machine learning
domains.governs: Model behavior correctness, evaluation validity, grounding.

domains.label: General knowledge
domains.governs: Everyday factual correctness when no specialized domain governs.
